CVE-2021-38173.title: Btrbk before 0.31.2 allows command execution because of the misha ...
CVE-2021-38173.description: Btrbk before 0.31.2 allows command execution because of the mishandling of remote hosts filtering SSH commands using ssh_filter_btrbk.sh in authorized_keys.
